zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Deynes是Deynes的女兒，於1480年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可宏寧。她於1505年與William de Howlett在英國英格蘭諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1548年在她的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Deynes是Deynes的女儿，于1480年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可宏寧。她于1505年与William de Howlett在英国英格兰諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1548年在她的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Deynes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: patronymic from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with degen ‘young warrior, vassal’, see Degen 2, Dein 1.

variants.name: Dienes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Sandor, Zol, Zoltan.
German: from a vernacular form of the personal name Dionysius (see Dennis ).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Deynes was born in 1480, in Honing, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Deynes. She married William de Howlett in 1505, in Wymondham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1548, in her hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Deynes est née en 1480, à Honing, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Deynes. Elle a épousé William de Howlett en 1505, à Wymondham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1548, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes Deynes wurde 1480 in Honing, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Deynes geboren. Sie hat 1505 in Wymondham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom William de Howlett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1548 im Alter von 68 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes Deynes è nata il nel 1480 nel Honing, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Deynes. Lei sposato William de Howlett nel 1505, nel Wymondham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1548, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Deynesは1480年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクホーニングでDeynesの娘として生まれた。1505年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウイモンドハムでWilliam de Howlettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1548年に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Deynes(은)는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 호닝에서 Deynes의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 윈이몽함에서 William de Howlett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1548년 그녀의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes Deynes nasceu em 1480, em Honing, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Deynes. Ela casou-se com William de Howlett em 1505, em Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1548, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Deynes родилась в 1480 г. в местности хонинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Deynes. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Howlett в 1505 г. в местности вимондхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1548 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes Deynes nació en 1480, en Honing, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Deynes. Se casó con William de Howlett en 1505, en Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1548, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
